name: Weyerhaeuser Company
description: Weyerhaeuser Company is one of the world's largest private owners of timberlands and a leading manufacturer of wood products. Founded in 1900, the company manages millions of acres of forests sustainably, providing timber for construction and industrial use while also engaging in real estate development, energy, and conservation initiatives. Headquartered in the United States, Weyerhaeuser operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT), focusing on long-term forest stewardship, renewable energy development, and the production of high-quality building materials, including engineered wood, lumber, and panels, to support sustainable housing and infrastructure projects globally.
